user_goal: N1 — UI/导航打磨（Sidebar 分组 + Docs 入口 + Settings Project tab + Keys 精简）

evaluator_feedback.summary: N1 Round 2 复验未通过。阻断问题仍存在：Settings -> Project 点击 Save Changes 后未触发 PATCH，请求未发出，项目名称与描述未更新。

issues.title: Settings Project tab 保存未触发 PATCH /api/projects/:id
evidence: 修改名称/描述后点击 Save Changes，Network 无 PATCH /api/projects/cmnspl7zc00r59ydumaq0ve2o
GET /api/projects/cmnspl7zc00r59ydumaq0ve2o 仍为旧值 API Patch Name / API Patch Desc
直接 PATCH /api/projects/cmnspl7zc00r59ydumaq0ve2o 返回 200（后端接口正常）
issues.expected: 点击 Save Changes 后发出 PATCH 并更新项目名称/描述
issues.actual: 未发出 PATCH 请求，项目信息保持旧值

generator_handoff: Generator completed F-N1-01~05. Changes: (1) sidebar.tsx — mainNav/adminNav refactored to grouped NavGroup[] with i18n group titles (groupCore/groupDev/groupData/groupModels/groupOps/groupUsers), Settings standalone below groups, admin groups separated by divider; (2) top-app-bar.tsx — removed Documentation/API Reference/Support nav links; (3) settings/page.tsx — added Account/Project tab switcher, new ProjectTab component with project name/description edit, stats (keyCount/callCount), and Danger Zone delete with confirmation; (4) api/projects/[id]/route.ts — added DELETE handler with deep cascade cleanup + stats in GET response; (5) keys/page.tsx — removed 3 stats cards + FAB, create button merged into table header bar; (6) en.json + zh-CN.json — all new keys synced (sidebar groups, settings project tab). Codex should verify F-N1-06 acceptance: sidebar grouping, docs entry, settings project tab CRUD, keys simplification, DS token consistency, i18n completeness.

session_notes.Kimi: Fix round 2: 彻底改用 native DOM click listener 模式（与 Account tab 的 doSaveName 完全一致）。用 saveBtnRef + useEffect 注册原生 click handler，用 useCallback + refs 读取最新值，用原生 fetch 代替 apiFetch。移除 React onClick。
session_notes.Planner: T1 done + N1 启动。BL-091+BL-079+BL-100 合并为 5 generator + 1 codex。Sidebar 分组、Docs 移入 sidebar、Settings Project tab、Keys 页精简。从 backlog 移除 3 条。
session_notes.Reviewer: N1 Round 2 复验完成，结论仍为 FAIL。Sidebar/Docs/Topbar/Keys/i18n 回归通过；阻断问题仍是 /settings Project tab 点击 Save Changes 后未触发 PATCH /api/projects/:id。Network 无 PATCH，请求未发出；直接 API PATCH 同路径返回 200，后端正常。已写 round2 报告并回退 fixing。
